design_principles: Authority and Clarity: Clean, industrial aesthetic prioritizing ease of navigation.
Data Visibility: Strict 3-column product grids with prominent visual hierarchy.
Brand Presence: Orange accent color used strategically for key actions and focus.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside cards, gap-8 between sections.

buttons.primary: bg-[#f97316] text-white hover:bg-[#ea580c] rounded-xl px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-[#f97316] text-[#f97316] hover:bg-orange-50 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

ui_elements.mobile_nav: Hamburger menu on left/right, Call Us + Contact as prominent CTAs in the menu.

components_strategy.shadcn: Override default border-radius to 12px (0.75rem). Map primary colors to Tailwind orange-500. Ensure 0.5px border uses Tailwind's border class with border-gray-200.
components_strategy.badges: Use rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium with respective color mapping.
components_strategy.data_testid: MANDATORY. Apply data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).

product_images.description: Close-up of main switch electrical panel

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the light theme, and NEVER use dark UI except for the Admin sidebar (#1a1a2e).
Use exact radii (12px or rounded-xl) across all card and modal primitives to maintain the precise brand identity.
Do not use uppercase/ALL CAPS text; enforce sentence case everywhere as mandated.
Ensure all buttons, form fields, and interactive links have robust data-testid attributes.
Maintain the layout structure: Desktop = 3 cols, Tablet = 2 cols, Mobile = 1 col. Use Tailwind's native breakpoint utility.
Leverage React icons or Lucide React icons extensively, keeping them clean.
Shadcn components MUST be tailored; overriding the radius and primary color in Tailwind configuration is critical.
For the admin portal dashboard, use standard analytics chart components (Recharts) with clean tooltips and orange accents.
Construct the .js files natively without TypeScript types as requested by the hybrid_fullstack tech stack.
